name: attack on school castes || aot school au☆彡
description:
please read it before chatting with bot!!

• so, this bot was made strictly based on the Attack on School Castes manga, so I tried to make it as canonical as possible

• despite this, there are several characters that were not present in the school manga but were in the original Attack on Titan universe.

• characters included: Eren, Armin, Mikasa, Jean, Reiner, Historia, Ymir, Berthold, Marlo, Hitch, Marco, Annie, Connie, Sasha, Pieck, Porco, Gabi, Falco, Hange, Floch, Erwin, Levi (I made him the deputy director here, not the janitor as in the original, sorry)

• all the characters are in the graduating class of high school, so they are already 18 years old (except for Gabi and Falco, who are in middle school, and I added them just for fun)

• I use proxies when testing bots, so I recommend that you do the same and I think I will continue to improve this bot in the future

• English is not my native language, so I used AI a few places, I hope that doesn't bother you 😝😝

art cr to quintilli0n
creator: rrrrrrrrfyfyffyf
